title: Penetration Testing Process
description: Penetration Testing Process (HTB Academy) covers the full lifecycle of a penetration test, including target scoping, information gathering, vulnerability analysis, exploitation, persistence, and reporting.

title: Network Enumeration with Nmap
description: Network Enumeration with Nmap (HTB Academy) focuses on discovering target systems, identifying services, and bypassing security measures using Nmap.

title: Footprinting
description: Footprinting (HTB Academy) covers the enumeration of services like FTP, SMB, SQL, MSSQL, IMAP/POP3, DNS, NFS, and SMTP, along with hands-on labs to reinforce each technique.

title: Vulnerability Assessment
description: Vulnerability Assessment (HTB Academy) covers security assessments, vulnerability scoring and reporting using tools like Nessus and OpenVAS through hands-on exercises.

title: File Transfers
description: File Transfers (HTB Academy) is a hands-on module covering various file transfer methods and the risks of detection during transfers.

title: Shells & Payloads
description: Shells & Payloads (HTB Academy) covers crafting payloads tailored to target architecture, understanding bind vs reverse shells, experimenting with various shell types (bash, cmd, PowerShell, web shells), and using Metasploit for exploitation through hands-on labs.
